meeting.track_notes: Turf. 2000m near-oval circuit. All races run anti-clockwise round turn with a run-in of 600m. DRAW: Low-number draws favoured in all races. 1600m 1400m 1200m 1000m 1800m DURBANVILLE OPEN A TAB ACCOUNT, GET ALL THE 600m FINISH LATEST RACING INFO DAILY AND BET AT WWW.TAB.CO.ZA 2000m
meeting.draw_bias_notes: DRAW: Low-number draws favoured in all races. 1600m 1400m 1200m 1000m 1800m DURBANVILLE OPEN A TAB ACCOUNT, GET ALL THE 600m FINISH LATEST RACING INFO DAILY AND BET AT WWW.TAB.CO.ZA 2000m

races.race_name: Hollywoodbets DURBANVILLE WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE (Fillies)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: ONTHEWINGSOFADOVE showed pace throughout when finishing 2nd on debut over this trip and, with any improvement, should go one better from an inside stall. WORLD OF SECRETS has the form and experience to trouble the selection, while BURSTURBUBBLE has shown enough to make her presence felt if overcoming the widest gate. GIMME PERFECT and GLAMOUR GIRL will know more about it after introductory outings so could improve to get involved. Newcomers CAPTAIN’S ELECT, UNCUT GEM, CLOUDY DAY, MIND OVER YOU and VIRIDIAN DAY are worth a market check on debut. Follow the betting moves!

races.race_name: LUCKY FISH NEW FORTUNE MAIDEN JUVE- NILE PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: MORDECHAI made encouraging late headway on debut over 1000m and should be more effective over this extended trip with that experience to count on. Returning CRACKER debuted in a hot maiden and should have more to offer after a break. PLATINUM GREY and HAPPY WINTER fit a similar profile and are open to improvement following gelding operations after their most recent outings. Watch the betting on newcomers CALIFORNIA CAT and VISIONARY FLAME.

races.race_name: BET WITH TOTE www.tote.co.za MAIDEN PLATE (F & M)
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Stablemates SPANISH WORLD and ODDS AND EVENS improved to finish 2nd in their most recent outings and could fight out the finish with further progress expected. NTIBINDI concedes 3kg to those 2yo principals but has the form and experience to pose a threat. MACRO GRAVITY and stable companion HURRICANE PAIGE are others who could improve to have a say.

races.race_name: RACE COAST INCENTIVES POWERED BY Hollywoodbets MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Stablemates UP IN FLAMES and SPARKLING SKY were inconvenienced in a messy-run race over 1600m last time. Both are capable of better and could play leading roles if improv- ing for this step up in trip. LIEFLING finished ahead of that pair and will also be better suited to this extended distance. QUIET PLACE, FREQUENT TRAVELLER and WHATWILLBEWILLBE have earning potential too.

races.race_name: READY STEADY GO SYNDICATE OPEN MAID- EN
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: This won’t take much winning so last-start runner-up RACHETTU could go one better with a repeat of that career-best performance. THE BIG BANG filled the runner-up berth last time over 1000m and will have a role to play if producing a similar effort over this extended trip. PROTECTOR OF PEACE and ROYAL CLINTON have shown enough to get involved too. Well- bred PURE AS SNOW has scope to improve so is another worth considering in exotic-bet permutations.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SUPERHERO wasn’t winning out of turn when opening his account over 1500m last time and this trip will be more to his liking, so another forward showing is expected. However, the value could lie with RED DAWN who has found form and consistency dropped in the ratings. He stayed on encouragingly over 1400m last time and will appreciate the extra 200m off a 2-point lower mark. Last-start winner GOLD INDEX remains competitive under a penalty, as do DEVIL A SAINT and SMART HORSE who have solid form credentials at this level.

races.race_name: KIKKULI STANDING AT PAARDEBERG STUD CLASS 5
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Youngster ONE MAGIC made a winning debut and the form of that race was franked by the subsequent victory of the runner-up. He concedes weight to older hard-knocking rivals but has the most scope for improvement so it could pay to follow his progress. AVIGNON, PRINCE OF TIBET and OZARK are consistent performers at this level. They have clashed recently in similar contests and are likely to remain competitive. LOVERS LANE appeals most of the remainder.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: GOLD GIBOSKI quickened smartly to win his last start over 1400m at this level without the blinkers. He won his only course-and-distance appearance so is effective over this shorter trip, and another forward showing is expected in his peak run under a 4-point penalty. KING REGENT and THE US OF A acquitted themselves well in a similar contest over 1200m last time so should have roles to play once more. Recently gelded BEWARE and hard-knocking DANCE VARIETY also have the means to make their presence felt.
